title: GMS Week 19 - TAKA TöT*?
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 13/05/2024
Image reference: 2024-05-13_gms-week-19-taka-tot_img1.jpg
Towards the end of the working week, the Bangladeshi Taka took the centerfold as it crashed by about 6.4% againstthe U.S. Dollar in a couple of days. This jump was certainly expected, in that, a measured BDT 7 devaluing of the Taka against the U.S.
